description:

This is the LDO Result and PM>60 for i\_Load <5mA. And it's giving 500mV as LDO\_Output. For Reference Please check from Slide No 14 Onwards.
D PHY Tx Integrated result(LDO+8:1bit Serializer+Pre-Driver+Driver) : [https://10xar-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/p/shovan/IQDrqTDWPzmjTZoUDNKHmytoAcMo3IET9gl2tyV-l10lydQ?e=lb4O5b](https://10xar-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/p/shovan/IQDrqTDWPzmjTZoUDNKHmytoAcMo3IET9gl2tyV-l10lydQ?e=lb4O5b)
This Result tells How The Approach has been Done for D PHY Tx

**_Summary:_**
In D PHY Tx, We are Using a LDO for 500mV Vreg and there is a 8:1 bit Serializer which Works in the 1GHz But Frequency and There after we are Using Pre-Driver and Two Differential Driver where We need 50 ohm terminated resistance which is Achieved by the tuning 32 Unit Cells (By Default 24 are Turned ON to get 50 ohm Terminated Resistance)

The Layout of the Clock Recovery+Clk\_Recovery\_Calibration+Retimer is Done and the Test Bench is on Slide No 7.
Post Layout Sim Results are from Slide No 12 onwards.

**_Summary:_**
Depending on the Layout Results, we have to change 3 things:

1.Delay Modules in the Comparator outputs(ab, bc, ca) path are not needed, otherwise the Data are coming after the CLK\_Edges

2.We have to increase unit delay from 100ps to 200ps

3.The Comp\_outputs Delays for Rising edges and Fallings edges are different, that’s why we have to increase the Biasing Current to reduce the Rising Edge delay, This thing will be decided when we do the Layout of the Comparator
